title: verbascum × subnigrum
intro: Verbascum × subnigrum, a hybrid plant species within the Verbascum genus, is commonly known as the dark mullein. It is a biennial plant with large, velvety leaves and tall spikes of yellow flowers, native to Europe and Asia. The medicinal properties of Verbascum × subnigrum are attributed to its high content of saponins and flavonoids, which have been used to treat various health issues, such as respiratory problems, skin conditions, and inflammation. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of coughs, colds, and digestive issues, while also promoting relaxation and reducing stress.
